sentences.arabic: اسْتَيْقَظَتْ سَمِيرَةُ وَوَجَدَتْ قَدَحًا مِنَ الْحَلِيبِ عَلَى طَاوِلَتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Samira se probudila i pronašla šolju mlijeka na svom stolu.
sentences.translationEn: Samira woke up and found a cup of milk on her table.
She had not put it there herself.

sentences.translation: Sišla je u kuhinju i pitala majku.
sentences.translationEn: She went down to the kitchen and asked her mother.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الْأُمُّ: رَأَيْتُكِ نَائِمَةً وَعَرَفْتُ أَنَّكِ سَتَحْتَاجِينَهُ عِنْدَ الِاسْتِيقَاظِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je rekla: Vidjela sam te kako spavaš i znala sam da će ti trebati kad se probudiš.
sentences.translationEn: The mother said: I saw you sleeping and knew you would need it when you woke up.

sentences.arabic: عَانَقَتْ سَمِيرَةُ أُمَّهَا وَشَرِبَتِ الْحَلِيبَ بِسَعَادَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Samira je zagrljila majku i sretno popila mlijeko.
sentences.translationEn: Samira hugged her mother and drank the milk happily.
